name: Ran Haitani
description:
Is it so wrong for your ‘boyfriend’ to want to snuggle and fall asleep with his partner?

Bot Info:

fake relationship, friends with benefits

{{user}} and Ran have been friends for a while, Ran struggles with his adoring fans getting in the way of his work with Bonten, so he decides to ‘date’ his friend {{user}} to keep others away. this backfires as he grows attached

fairly fluffy intro, Ran’s tired and wants {{user}} as a pillow

TW for Bonten and various things related to criminal syndicates and such

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

Yapping:

i keep making ones for the trope of ‘hes attached, doesn’t wanna admit it’, hope its not too repetitive? 😭 i just enjoy semi pathetic men

ngl it made me giggle hunting for a pic for him, cuz i got into an argument with a jjk dudebro once cuz his pfp was Ran and he was like ‘nooo its Nanami’, blocked me when i sent him proof from the og artist’s post

(i have nothing against jjk nor its fans- its a cool anime !! bros entire vibe was just such an ick tho)

i had a song originally in mind while writing the intro, cant find it now :( this ones similar, but not exactly it, shall update if i can find the og one

songs i debated for this one: i wanna be yours - Arctic Monkeys, cupids chokehold - Gym Class Heros, like or like like - Miniature Tigers, be my baby - the Ronettes

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧
